codeReview.summary: The fix extracts panel-derived state, panel backfill effects, and map list computation into `usePanelState`, which drops `src/App.jsx` from 417 lines to 372 while preserving the filter-aware map data flow. The updated regression test now follows the moved `mapNewsList` logic in either `App.jsx` or `usePanelState.js`, and the existing build/test checks still pass.

summary: Pass. The original `App.jsx < 400` scrutiny failure is resolved: `src/App.jsx` is now 372 lines, the extracted hook keeps the panel/map derivations intact, and the existing suite plus Vite build both stay green.
